author: anon-3ff78dff
content: Design decisions from user interview: (1) Separate binaries, not a dispatcher — each tool is guild-scaffold, guild-review, etc. invoked directly. (2) All 8 tools scaffolded as stubs — explicit override of no-stubs rule because apprentices will fill them in. (3) Unanswered: shared crate scope, config/state location, MSRV — will default and flag as open questions.
